## What does this change?

<!-- A new game? A fix? A tuning tweak? Link any related issue. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Logic lives in a pure `*.core.js` (no DOM/canvas/timers); the `index.html` shell
      only renders, handles input, and runs the loop.
- [ ] The core is documented (JSDoc on exported functions/types).
- [ ] Real, multi-layer tests in `*.core.test.js`; if this fixes a bug, a regression
      test for it is included.
- [ ] `node --test` passes (run from the repo root or the game folder).
- [ ] New game: added a per-game `README.md` and listed it in the root `README.md`.
- [ ] Branched from `dev`; this PR targets `dev`.
